2025-03-05T12:37:00.CONTENT_EN: Gloucester Road (Central bound) is busy. Motorists passing through the above road section are advised to drive with utmost care and patience.
2025-03-05T12:37:00.CONTENT_CN: 告士打道(往中環方向)的交通繁忙。駕駛人士行經上述路段敬請忍讓及小心駕駛。

2025-03-05T13:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Traffic at Gloucester Road (Central bound) has resumed normal.
2025-03-05T13:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 告士打道(往中環方向)的交通現已恢復正常。
